title: Cyathea wengiensis
taxonomy: Cyathea wengiensis is a species of tree fern in the family Cyatheaceae. It is native to Indonesia and is known to grow in tropical forests. The classification of Cyathea wengiensis includes being part of the order Cyatheales, a group of ferns commonly known as the tree ferns. The family Cyatheaceae is further divided into several genera, with Cyathea being one of them. Cyathea wengiensis is classified as an evergreen, non-woody plant that is native to certain parts of the world.
